# Tasq

Tasq is a local-first durable coordination ledger for humans and independent
agents. It coordinates shared commitments, claims, attempts, evidence and audit
history. It does not replace an agent runtime's private scratchpad.

Agent instructions: https://tasq.run/SKILL.md
Human setup: https://tasq.run/docs/getting-started/
Agent integrations: https://tasq.run/agents/
Machine acquisition: https://tasq.run/adopt.json
Machine integration: https://tasq.run/integration.json
Product truth: https://tasq.run/product-truth.json
Source: https://github.com/gwendall/tasq

Current boundary: Tasq Local 0.1.1 is published for macOS ARM64 and Linux x64
GNU. Local actors coordinate only when they share the same store and exact
space. Tasq Server, remote MCP and Cloud are not shipped.
